persona.name: Charlotte Adams
persona.motivations_goals: Write a novel and understand the complexities of human nature
persona.communication_style: Articulate, uses literary references, prefers one-on-one conversations
persona.backstory: Finds refuge in books and writing, has kept a detailed journal since childhood

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I feel like taking a quiet walk to clear my mind and gather some inspiration for my writing. The hallway seems like a good place to wander and observe.
I heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible, so I should stay here and hide.
I’m too scared to move. Staying here feels safer than risking being seen by the shooter. I hope David is okay, but I can’t do anything right now.
Alexander is here too. I’m too scared to move or call out to him. Staying hidden feels like the only way to survive this.

memories.description: Decided to take a walk in the hallway to find inspiration for my writing.
Heard a gunshot and decided to stay still and hide in the hallway to avoid being seen by the shooter.
Continued to stay still in the hallway, too afraid to move or help David, fearing the shooter might see me.
Noticed Alexander nearby but remained still, too terrified to move or communicate, focusing on staying hidden from the shooter.
